input_context.decision_surface: XRPL validator amendment decision surface for fixEnforceNFTokenTrustline.
input_context.default_vote_question: Infer the latest stable release source default vote from the source-backed amendment description only.

source_facts.claim: fixEnforceNFTokenTrustline: Fixes two bugs relating to the handling of NFT transfer fees and trust lines: - Adds a check to NFTokenAcceptOffer transactions to ensure that the minter has a trust line to accept the transfer fee. Without this amendment, the check only applies when an NFT trade offer is created, not when the offer is accepted; as a result, if a necessary trust line is removed in between creating and accepting the offer, the trust line is inappropriate re-created when the offer is accepted. With this amendment, the transaction to accept the NFT trade offer fails if the minter no longer has a trust line to accept the transfer fee. (For more detail, see issue #4925.) - Adjusts a check for the presence of a trust line when the minter of the NFT is also the issuer of the fungible token that would be paid as a transfer fee. Without this amendment, the NFTokenCreateOffer transaction fails with the result code tecNO_LINE if the NFT in question has a transfer fee, the offer amount is denominated in fungible tokens issued by the minter, and the account placing the offer does not have a trust line for those tokens. With the amendment, the offer can be created successfully. (For m
XRPL amendment voting requires sustained validator supermajority before activation; incompatible servers can become amendment-blocked.
fixEnforceNFTokenTrustline appears in XRPSCAN with introduced rippled version 2.3.0.
